lessons.title: Assault, Assault Causing Harm, and Serious Harm
lessons.description: Section 2 of the NFOATP 1997 defines the offence of assault.

lessons.title: Harassment and Stalking — S.10, S.10A NFOATP 1997
lessons.description: This is a topic that the FE-1 examiner has tested before, and it is an area where students frequently confuse the two offences. So let's get it absolutely clear.
